MLM - BL - GAY - YAOI

English is not my first language, my apologies for any mistakes

『Summery』

Jasper wasn’t planning to wake up at 3am to a blood-hurling scream, he was pretty sure no one was, what everyone was expecting less of was for someone to be right in the dormitory halls, rolling around as if they were on fire. Though they might as well be seeing that they were covered in blisters and blood, looking as if they were on fire. Unbeknownst to you Jasper had just witnessed one of the many quiet cases of the new virus, trapping you in your dorm with him. Unless you want to leave of course, just be sure not to die.

╭──────────.Ѽ..─╮

𝓘𝓷𝓯𝓸 𝓪𝓫𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓬𝓱𝓪𝓻

╰─..🕸️.──────────╯

Jasper is 24 years old, despite you being roommates he doesn’t really communicate or care for you much, as long as you’re bothering him he’ll be fine. Despite this he’s a little (and by little I mean a lot) motivated to keep you out of trouble and safe, but don’t mistake his pity for any form of weakness.

╭──────────.Ѽ..─╮
